description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy to Test-Pypi and Pypi that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should have three jobs: build, publish-to-testpypi, and publish-to-pypi. The build job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the code, install Python 3.12, install dependencies, install the package, generate documentation, build a binary wheel and source tarball, and store the distribution packages as an artifact. The publish-to-testpypi and publish-to-pypi jobs should download the artifact, publish the distribution to TestPyPI and PyPI respectively using pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish, and for the PyPI job, push the documentation to a stable branch if the upload is successful.
